resumo: Senior Software Developer with 8 years of experience. Specialized in refactoring, performance, and rendering engineering of web and mobile interfaces, combined with solid backend experience — including API architecture, cloud services, and databases. Experience in team leadership and mentoring developers.

Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS (Amplify, Cognito, S3, SNS, SES, Lambda, Elastic Beanstalk)

practices: Frontend and backend architecture definition, Code refactoring, Performance optimization, Technical documentation and coding standards, Team leadership and management, Mentoring and pair programming, AI-assisted development and agentic engineering (Cursor, Claude Code)

bullets: Built a service order management application from scratch in the maritime logistics sector using React and an internal UI library, recognized by clients for its speed and quality of experience
Modernized a legacy Angular application through bug fixes, feature additions, and process improvements
Optimized build configuration and added observability tools, reducing JS bundle download and parse time, cutting application startup by 4 seconds

Launched a social network for a Catholic audience using React Native and TypeScript, reaching 50,000 downloads and 10,000 monthly active users
Built audio/video player, communities, comments, push notifications, rich text editor (without libraries), and login/sign-up flows
Created README documentation on code practices and architecture, reducing new developer ramp-up from 5 to 3 days
Authored business rule documentation, streamlining communication across teams
Migrated from Amplify + AppSync to NestJS + Prisma on DynamoDB, Lambda, S3, SNS, Cognito, RDS, SES, and Elastic Beanstalk, cutting cloud infrastructure costs by 60%
Set up PaaS staging environments on Heroku and Render
Automated CI/CD pipeline for React Native via CodeMagic, reducing deployment from 1 hour to 20 minutes
Delivered a coupon app for a São Paulo shopping mall network, surpassing 100,000 downloads on the Play Store
Optimized list rendering with FlatList, getItemLayout, and infinite pagination, maintaining 60fps scrolling and eliminating blank spaces during rapid scroll
Mentored 2 developers through pair programming throughout the project, accelerating their React Native proficiency and establishing code best practices
Built and maintained an internal management tool using Angular, serving approximately 50 internal users across multiple teams
Created a reusable UI component library from prototypes, reducing duplicated CSS by 30% and cutting code duplication across the application
Redesigned the side navigation bar as an independent container with blur effects triggered only after resize completion, eliminating visual jank and delivering consistent 60fps during window resizing
Documented implemented solutions used by 10 developers for onboarding and reference
Prototyped and coded interfaces for a personal vehicle management app
Refactored the complete codebase within one week alongside a coworker, cutting feature development time by half
Standardized code practices across a 5-person team through documentation for file organization, naming conventions, and ESLint rules, eliminating inconsistencies between developers
Created animated logo assets using After Effects and Lottie for the product's institutional website
Prototyped and coded interfaces for a delivery application
Developed software for external clients as part of a software services company
